meaning: adj.轻浮的,(衣服)不合身的,翅状的n.轻浮的人,宽大不合身的衣服,海市蜃楼
examples: Then flyaway balloons caught his eye.
Stray birds of summer come to my window to sing and flyaway.
Traditional flyaway rubber balloons were under attack from environmentalists and quickly losing their popularity.
The snow is knee-deep but flyaway light and effortless to move through.
Where Augustyniak is lanky, with the flyaway hair and a round-about conversational style, Amzalag is compact, drily ironic and gets crisply to the point.
